<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band01_chunk013.pdf#page=9 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band01 p616 -->


[[File:Band01_chunk013_p009_img001.jpg|thumb|O<sub>3</sub> Iesus heilt Kranke (oben) ED<sub>4</sub> Iesus heilt zwei Blinde (unten]]



[[File:Band01_chunk013_p009_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band01_chunk013_p009_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band01_chunk013_p009_img004.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band01 p617 -->
